narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 6-C (precinct in Ross County) has 700 registered voters, with 66.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points.
